description: Renders an ordered sequence of content units as a vertical progression with numbered step dots on a connecting line. Each unit shows a title, category badge (color-resolved via design tokens), and expandable description. Generic enough for chapters, argument steps, methodology phases, dialectical moves, policy stages, or any ordered analytical units where progression matters.

number_field.description: Explicit numbering field (falls back to extracting from title or using index)

strip_prefix.description: Custom regex to strip from title (default strips Chapter/Step/Phase/Stage N:)
